languages.text: "Милостью Бога-Императора, Ваша Светлость. Вы ушли, мы отбросили несколько волн противника. Затем все стало рушиться, а еретические железки выключились. Мы собрали раненых и побежали. Выбрались ровно в момент, когда все обрушилось. Там нас подобрал шаттл. Я уже распорядилась вырезать на стене памяти имена тех, кто погиб в том проклятом месте".

"By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."
languages.original_text: "Милостью Бога-Императора, Ваша Светлость. Вы ушли, мы отбросили несколько волн противника. Затем все стало рушиться, а еретические железки выключились. Мы собрали раненых и побежали. Выбрались ровно в момент, когда все обрушилось. Там нас подобрал шаттл. Я уже распорядилась вырезать на стене памяти имена тех, кто погиб в том проклятом месте".

traits.locale_text: "By the God-Emperor's mercy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretic iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out at the exact moment the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up there. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

"By the God-Emperor's mercy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretic iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out at the exact moment the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up there. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

"By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

"By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

languages.text: “承蒙神皇庇佑，大人。您离开后，我们击退了数波敌人的攻击。随后整座设施开始崩塌，那些异端的铁家伙也停摆了。我们集合好伤员，迅速撤离，在坍塌的瞬间逃出。外面有一艘穿梭机接应了我们。我已下令，将那些倒在那片被诅咒之地的阵亡者的姓名，铭刻到纪念墙上去。”
languages.original_text: "By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: “承蒙神皇庇佑，大人。您离开后，我们击退了数波敌人的攻击。随后整座设施开始崩塌，那些异端的铁家伙也停摆了。我们集合好伤员，迅速撤离，在坍塌的瞬间逃出。外面有一艘穿梭机接应了我们。我已下令，将那些倒在那片被诅咒之地的阵亡者的姓名，铭刻到纪念墙上去。”

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'un lütfuyla {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Siz gittikten sonra düşmanın birkaç dalgasını püskürttük. Sonra her yer çökmeye başladı ve kâfir demir şeyler kapandı. Yaralıları toplayıp kaçtık. Tam mekân çökerken dışarı çıkmayı başardık. Dışarıda bir mekik bizi aldı. Lanet yerde şehit düşenlerin isimlerinin anıt duvarına kazınmasını emrettim bile."
languages.original_text: "By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'un lütfuyla {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Siz gittikten sonra düşmanın birkaç dalgasını püskürttük. Sonra her yer çökmeye başladı ve kâfir demir şeyler kapandı. Yaralıları toplayıp kaçtık. Tam mekân çökerken dışarı çıkmayı başardık. Dışarıda bir mekik bizi aldı. Lanet yerde şehit düşenlerin isimlerinin anıt duvarına kazınmasını emrettim bile."

languages.text: « Par la grâce de l'Empereur-Dieu, Votre Seigneurie. Après votre départ, nous avons repoussé plusieurs vagues d'ennemis. Tout a commencé à s'écrouler, et ces machines hérétiques ont cessé de fonctionner. Nous avons fui avec nos blessés. Nous nous en sommes sortis de justesse alors que l'endroit s'effondrait et une navette nous a récupérés. J'ai ordonné que les noms de ceux tombés au combat soient gravés sur le mur aux disparus. »
languages.original_text: "By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: « Par la grâce de l'Empereur-Dieu, Votre Seigneurie. Après votre départ, nous avons repoussé plusieurs vagues d'ennemis. Tout a commencé à s'écrouler, et ces machines hérétiques ont cessé de fonctionner. Nous avons fui avec nos blessés. Nous nous en sommes sortis de justesse alors que l'endroit s'effondrait et une navette nous a récupérés. J'ai ordonné que les noms de ceux tombés au combat soient gravés sur le mur aux disparus. »

languages.text: «Por la gracia del Emperador, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Después de su marcha, rechazamos a varias oleadas de enemigos. Después, todo el lugar comenzó a venirse abajo y esas cosas heréticas de hierro se apagaron. Reunimos a los heridos y huimos. Conseguimos salir mientras la estructura colapsaba. Nos recogió una lanzadera fuera. Ya he ordenado que los nombres de quienes cayeron en aquel lugar maldito se inscriban en el muro conmemorativo».
languages.original_text: "By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: «Por la gracia del Emperador, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Después de su marcha, rechazamos a varias oleadas de enemigos. Después, todo el lugar comenzó a venirse abajo y esas cosas heréticas de hierro se apagaron. Reunimos a los heridos y huimos. Conseguimos salir mientras la estructura colapsaba. Nos recogió una lanzadera fuera. Ya he ordenado que los nombres de quienes cayeron en aquel lugar maldito se inscriban en el muro conmemorativo».

languages.text: "So der Gottimperator will, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Als Ihr weg wart, haben wir mehrere Wellen des Feindes zurückgeworfen. Dann ist alles eingestürzt und die ketzerischen Eisendinger wurden deaktiviert. Wir haben die Verwundeten gepackt und sind gerannt. Wir haben es gerade noch rausgeschafft. Draußen hat uns ein Shuttle abgeholt. Ich habe bereits angeordnet, dass die Namen der an diesem verfluchten Ort gefallenen Soldaten in die Gedenkwand gemeißelt werden."
languages.original_text: "By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: "So der Gottimperator will, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Als Ihr weg wart, haben wir mehrere Wellen des Feindes zurückgeworfen. Dann ist alles eingestürzt und die ketzerischen Eisendinger wurden deaktiviert. Wir haben die Verwundeten gepackt und sind gerannt. Wir haben es gerade noch rausgeschafft. Draußen hat uns ein Shuttle abgeholt. Ich habe bereits angeordnet, dass die Namen der an diesem verfluchten Ort gefallenen Soldaten in die Gedenkwand gemeißelt werden."

languages.text: 「神皇帝の御慈悲により、貴{mf|卿|女卿}。貴{mf|卿|女卿}が去った後、敵の襲撃を幾度となく撃退しました。しかし、その直後、この場所が崩れ始め、異端の鉄のものが停止しました。負傷者をまとめ、逃走しました。この場所が崩壊する直前に脱出することができました。シャトルが外で待っていました。この呪われた場所で命を落とした者の名を、記念の壁に刻むよう命じました。」
languages.original_text: "By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."
